title: arrhenatherum elatius var. tuberosum
intro: Arrhenatherum elatius var. tuberosum, also known as tuberous melick, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum elatius var. tuberosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or salve form to harness its medicinal properties.
